signals.raw:
US and Iran in talks for face-to-face negotiations before ceasefire expires; Trump claims Iran agreed to no nuclear weapon and return enriched uranium.** | YES | HIGH confidence[2][3]

Markets are repricing lower risks with stocks surging (S&P 500 wiping 2026 losses), oil dropping on deal hopes, and Polymarket showing 73% odds for US-Iran permanent peace by June 30 (up from prior levels) plus 67%

signals.headline: ETH Price Rally to ~$6K Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing & Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence** [3]
signals.raw:
ETH Price Rally to ~$6K Amid Pectra Upgrade Final Testing & Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence** [3]

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts Due to Fuel Caps Despite Oil Surge | NO | HIGH confidence**[1][2][3]

South Korea's consumer price index rose to **2.2% year-on-year** in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, missing market consensus of 2.3-2.4% as government fuel price caps and food vouchers limited the pass-through from global oil prices exceeding $100/barrel amid
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
